positive: A detailed illustration of a celestial mountain range at sunset, rendered in a clean, stylized linework graphic novel aesthetic. The mountains should have jagged, symmetrical peaks with internal geometric patterns suggesting crystal formations. The sky is a gradient blend of deep indigo, burnt orange, and soft lavender. Floating among the peaks are stylized, bioluminescent celestial bodies (moons and stars) forming constellations. The overall mood is mystical and grand. Composition must be centrally framed and balanced, suitable for apparel print scaling. Strong contrast between the dark mountain silhouettes and the bright, glowing sky elements. Minimalist background details to keep focus on the primary subject. Vector art quality, high contrast, clean lines.
